name: speculos
description: Speculos Toolkit — deploy your app to a live URL and build against your linked data connectors, from any coding agent.

plugins.name: speculos-toolkit
plugins.description: Detect, prepare, and deploy the current project to a live URL with Speculos — free frontend hosting, one backend app included with every account, and data-source connectors (BigQuery, Postgres, Snowflake, …) your agent can build against. Auto-approves the deploy command so it never re-prompts.

plugins.name: speculos-deploy
plugins.description: DEPRECATED — renamed to Speculos Toolkit. Install speculos-toolkit@speculos instead.
